items.title: [正面] Yes it's still a gacha, but this has a lot of dept...
items.summary: Yes it's still a gacha, but this has a lot of depth and a lot of ways of avoiding spending anything. Slay the Spire, but with less focus on the roguelite elements. Good in small bursts, but also can be played for hours at a time. Stick with it if it seems you are hitting a roadblock + ignore some of the early warnings about being underleveled while doing the main story levels.

items.summary: Game so good, It makes you forget that It's a gacha (sin in the eyes of God) (:

items.title: [正面] que jogo bom da porra
[正面] I don't usually write reviews at all but I feel li...
items.summary:
I don't usually write reviews at all but I feel like morimens really deserve the praise. 

Morimens serves you beautiful art, well-written and deep stories. Maybe not deep but the stories are easily touching and keeps you invested, it VERY seldomly rants in the stories for long durations (which most other story games do which is to me bad writing) I'd say I'm still pretty new to the game and I'm still in faded legacy (arc 1) but the writing of these stories have really impressed me- its touching sometimes they add a little comedy in it and lots of mystery for you to think about

Gameplay wise I'd say morimens really nails team building aspects, as well as the roguelite aspect in the gameplay. The teams (if you don't care about metas) can be really fun to build, leveling different awakeners to build different teams are also easy so you can experiment around! I feel like as long as you read and experiment you can naturally make a good team by yourself although i do look at guides sometimes. 

all in all good story pretty art and also F2P!!! you should definitely play the game and even spend money if you want to support them! (they're really generous even if you dont)
